lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.10]Run, run, run — race the tide!
[00:03.38]Run, run, run — Sea Stars glide!
[00:06.68]Faster than the waves can chase,
[00:08.32]Race the tide — first place!
[00:10.10]Run, run, run — race the tide!
[00:13.72]Run, run, run — Sea Stars glide!
[00:16.66]Sand below and sky above,
[00:18.38]Race the tide with the crew you love!
[00:23.46]Run-run, race-race, GO GO GO!
[00:24.44]Run-run, race-race, GO GO GO!
